# RankSure — EAPCET College Predictor

> RankSure helps AP EAPCET 2025 students predict which engineering colleges
> they can get into based on their rank. Uses 3 years of official cutoff data
> from 328+ colleges and 6,243 records.

## Key Pages
- / — EAPCET rank predictor tool (enter rank → see Safe/Medium/Reach colleges)
- /tools/counselling — AP & TS EAPCET counselling dates and document checklist
- /tools/scholarships — Government and private scholarship guide for engineering students
- /tools/reimbursement — Fee reimbursement eligibility checker (AP & Telangana)
- /compare — Side-by-side comparison of up to 3 colleges
- /college/[name] — Individual college details with cutoff trends and transport info
- /college/[name]/cutoff — Full branch-wise cutoff history with charts (2023–2025)

## Data Sources
- AP EAPCET official allotment data (2023, 2024, 2025)
- 6,243 cutoff records across 328+ colleges and 117 branches
- Prediction model uses Trend-Adjusted Normal Distribution

## Topics Covered
- EAPCET college prediction by rank
- Branch-wise opening and closing rank cutoffs
- College comparison (fees, placements, cutoffs)
- AP & TS counselling schedule and process
- Fee reimbursement eligibility (Vidya Deevena, TS ePASS, etc.)
- Scholarship schemes for engineering students
- Transport routes to colleges
